case_title: GRACE MCKENNA VS. BANK OF AMERICA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCKENNA, GRACE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA $4,861.50 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,926.50, BANK OF AMERICA ACTED NEGLIGENTLY BY FAILING TO RECOGNIZE THE PERSON WHO HAD PREPROPERATED THE FRAUD AND WAS KNOWN TO THE BANK OF AMERICA. ALSO BANK OF AMERICA ACTED NEGLIGENTLY BY CASHING SUCH A LARGE FRAUDULENT CHECK WHEN PLAINTIFF ONLY HAD ABOUT $20 IN THE ACCOUNT SHE WAS USING FOR THIS TRANSACTION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-26-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,861.50 FILED BY MCKENNA, GRACE AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-26-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-08-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA
DECLARATION ON CURRENT ADDRESS. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCKENNA, GRACE
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-03-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCKENNA, GRACE AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-26-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-26-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF GRACE MCKENNA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JENNIFER CHATMAN ASST. VICE PRESIDENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
